attributes.action: Regulate AI because it is insidious, and nobody voted for it.
attributes.additional_details: AI is a clear and present danger to society, freedom, human rights, and democratic values. It is being allowed to seep into every aspect of life unchecked and people were never asked if they wanted it. It is an insidious technology created by insidious people with bad intentions. As such, it must be regulated in order to ensure that it does not cause immense suffering.
attributes.background: Strongly regulate AI to ensure it is serving humanity. AI companies, in particular, Palantir are openly boasting of their intention to undermine democracies whilst removing job security and job satisfaction for billions of people, in particular, educated women.

rejection.details:
It's not clear to us exactly what you want the Government to do in terms of regulation.  There are some petitions already open which might align with your intentions and which you may wish to sign:

Seek a global ban on superintelligence and to agree safe AI development path:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760674

Ban all use of AI in the UK: 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754836
